name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry in Miami, FL is part of the EZPAWN family, offering pawn loans, gold buying, and pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25–70% off retail.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, FL operates as part of the EZPAWN family of stores — a national pawn chain with standardized systems, a loyalty rewards program, and an online shopping platform. The store serves the Miami community with a broad set of financial and retail services under one roof, including collateral-based lending, precious metals purchasing, and resale of pre-owned merchandise.

The store's core offering is pawn loans: customers bring in items of value, receive a cash loan against those items, and can redeem them later by repaying the loan plus fees. Beyond pawning, Value Pawn buys gold and diamond jewelry outright, including broken gold of any karat, with in-store testing to determine value. On the retail side, the store carries thousands of pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, handbags, and sneakers at 25–70% off new retail prices, with new inventory arriving daily. Additional financial services include firearms sales and auto loans.

Several features distinguish this location from independent pawn shops. The EZPAWN-branded EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers earn points on pawns, redemptions, and purchases, and manage transactions online. An Instant Quote tool on the website lets customers get an estimated value for electronics before walking in. Layaway is available with only 10% down, and a "Take Today" option partners with third-party lenders for buy-now-pay-later on eligible purchases. A Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts, trade-up benefits, free stone replacement, and free cleaning.

Honestly, pawn loans are short-term, fee-bearing transactions — not conventional loans — and the website does not disclose interest rates or APRs, which vary by state and must be reviewed in person. The store is part of the EZPAWN corporate network, not an independent local operation, which means policies and pricing are largely standardized. This is a practical resource for cash emergencies or discounted merchandise, but borrowers should treat it as a last resort after exhausting lower-cost options, as pawn loan fees can be significant on an annualized basis.
address: 8345 S US Hwy 17 92, Fern Park, FL 32730

company_info.headquarters: 8345 S US Hwy 17 92, Fern Park, FL 32730

pros: Open seven days a week, including Sundays (12–5pm) and extended weekday hours until 7pm
EZ+ Rewards Program earns points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions
Online Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value before visiting the store
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new inventory
Jewelry VIP Program includes guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up, free stone replacement, and free cleaning
Gold testing performed in-store to help ensure fair pricing on jewelry sales
cons: Pawn loan interest rates and APR not disclosed on the website — must be reviewed in-store
Items must be in decent working condition to qualify for a pawn loan; damaged items may be declined
"Take Today" financing relies on third-party lenders with credit eligibility requirements that are not detailed
Sunday hours are limited to five hours (12–5pm) compared to full weekday availability
All retail merchandise is pre-owned; no new products sold
best_for: Miami residents who need fast cash and have electronics, jewelry, tools, or other valuables to use as collateral
Sellers of gold, diamond, or broken jewelry looking for an immediate in-store offer
Bargain shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned electronics, gaming gear, or name-brand items
Shoppers who want layaway or flexible payment options on pre-owned merchandise without a credit check
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for Miami consumers who need same-day cash by collateralizing personal valuables, or who want deeply discounted pre-owned goods with layaway flexibility. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs — fees and effective APR — are not published online and can be high; this should be a short-term emergency tool, not a routine borrowing strategy.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying (any karat, including broken gold)
EZ+ Rewards Program (points on pawns, redemptions, purchases)
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan value, trade-up, cleaning, stone replacement)
Product Protection Plan for purchased merchandise
Online shop with daily new inventory
